reviews.review_description: The old map looked perfect and not needing a key for horror new map 2/10 old 100000/10 am I the only one

I honestly think that Mantis is a really awesome game to play with friends/ families. The game is very well designed and detailed within the virtual world. The community is also an awesome place to make new friends, play around, etc. I highly recommend installing this game to the people that doesn’t have it downloaded already, I also recommend joining their discord community to participate in some really fun events and tournaments. But over I’ll rate the game and community both with a 100/10 tbh. Everything is very well made and such. (Join the discord to be followed up on some updates and such)

reviews.review_title: This game is so bad and horrible

reviews.review_description: I say this with no exaggeration. There is nothing to do. It’s just a big map. Nothing happens. Just walk around a bit and delete the game.
